name: @alkemio/excalidraw-element-shim
description: Minimal stand-in for the internal Excalidraw `@excalidraw/element` package that @alkemio/excalidraw-yjs-binding declares as a (unpublished) dependency. Provides only the runtime `CaptureUpdateAction` enum the binding consumes, and re-exports element types from the published @alkemio/excalidraw bundle — so the binding resolves without pulling the whole editor (which breaks unit tests via its open-color JSON import). See vendor/excalidraw-element-shim/README.md.
